commands.review_summary:
This PR updates Telegram draft streaming and shared auto-reply metadata preservation so answer blocks separated by tool or assistant-message boundaries rotate or materialize instead of overwriting the prior preview, with focused regression tests.

PR surface: Source +400, Tests +1130. Total +1530 across 14 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection, though I did not run a live Telegram repro. Current main leaves non-final block previews unfinalized and only rotates on assistant-message start when finalized, matching the reported overwrite sequence.
